query:
SELECT short_code,
                   kind,
                   status,
                   left(body, 200) AS body_excerpt,
                   end_user_email,
                   anon_token_hash IS NOT NULL AS is_anonymous,
                   accepted_at
            FROM feedback
            WHERE tenant_id = $1
              AND project_id = $2
              AND ($3::text IS NULL OR status = $3)
            ORDER BY accepted_at DESC
            LIMIT $4
            OFFSET $5
